description: LibreWXR-style radar source catalog for Gusty. Entries may be documented here before they are enabled; the fetcher only ingests entries with enabled=true and redistribution.allowed=true.

providers.name: FMI Open Data Finland radar rain rate
providers.attribution: Finnish Meteorological Institute / FMI Open Data
providers.notes: Implemented as built-in provider fmi_open_data. This catalog entry documents the source and should stay disabled to avoid duplicate ingestion.

providers.name: Met Office UK rainfall radar candidate

redistribution.license: Unknown until product subscription terms are confirmed

providers.notes: Do not enable until the exact rainfall radar product and redistribution terms are confirmed for Gusty.

providers.name: Meteo-France rainfall radar candidate

redistribution.license: Unknown until exact API product terms are confirmed

providers.notes: Keep disabled until the API product endpoint and redistribution licence are verified.

providers.name: AEMET Spain radar candidate

redistribution.license: Unknown until exact product terms are confirmed

providers.notes: Keep disabled until the radar endpoint and redistribution licence are verified.

providers.name: Australia BoM radar

redistribution.license: BoM says radar images, high-resolution maps, and specialised data may require a data licence agreement.

providers.notes: Do not scrape or republish unless Gusty obtains a data licence agreement.
